formulas.name: 1. Calculation of Maximum Heart Rate (MHR)
formulas.notes: to determine the maximum heart rate for an individual

formulas.name: 2. Calculation of Target Heart Rate (THR) Zone
formulas.variables: MHR: maximum heart rate, RHR: resting heart rate, intensity: as a decimal
formulas.notes: to determine the target heart rate zone for exercise

formulas.name: 3. Body Mass Index (BMI) Calculation
formulas.variables: weight in kg, height in meters
formulas.notes: to determine the body mass index of an individual

formulas.name: 4. Calculation of Basal Metabolic Rate (BMR) for Men
formulas.variables: weight in lbs, height in inches, age in years
formulas.notes: to estimate the basal metabolic rate for men

formulas.name: 5. Calculation of Basal Metabolic Rate (BMR) for Women
formulas.variables: weight in lbs, height in inches, age in years
formulas.notes: to estimate the basal metabolic rate for women

formulas.name: 6. Daily Caloric Needs Calculation
formulas.formula: Daily Caloric Needs = BMR × activity factor
formulas.variables: BMR: basal metabolic rate, activity factor: varies based on activity level
formulas.notes: to determine the daily caloric needs of an individual

formulas.name: 7. Calculation of Training Intensity
formulas.variables: work: duration of work, rest: duration of rest
formulas.notes: to determine the intensity of a training session

formulas.name: 8. Calculation of VO2 Max
formulas.formula: VO2 Max = 15 × (distance in meters / time in minutes)
formulas.variables: distance in meters, time in minutes
formulas.notes: to estimate the aerobic capacity of an individual

formulas.name: 9. Calculation of Flexibility Ratio
formulas.formula: Flexibility Ratio = (reach in cm / height in cm) × 100
formulas.variables: reach in cm, height in cm
formulas.notes: to determine the flexibility of an individual

formulas.name: 10. Calculation of Power Output
formulas.variables: force in Newtons, distance in meters, time in seconds
formulas.notes: to determine the power output of an individual during exercise
